sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: The purpose of this Act is to make provision for the release of long-term and short-term prisoners on parole or compassionate release.

sections.title: Parole eligibility date
sections.content: A long-term prisoner's parole eligibility date is one-third of the way through the sentence or 12 years, whichever is less.

sections.title: Test for release on parole
sections.content: The Parole Board must not order release on parole unless satisfied that the prisoner does not pose an undue risk to the safety of the community.
